splitTemplates.name: Hybrid Performance Split (Spring 2026)
splitTemplates.description: Consolidated stress: sprints and lower body lifts on the same day. Main compound lifts live in the 5-8 rep range at high intent. Accessories and small muscles (side delts, rear delts, face pulls) get higher reps for volume. Functional staples like Zercher Bulgarian Split Squats, Pendlay Rows, and Deadlift Rows. Optional post-lift Zone 2 finishers on push/pull days.

Monday.summary:

- Barbell Row: 3x6-8
- Pull Ups: 3xAMRAP

- RDL: 3x8
- Hamstring Curls: 3x10

splitTemplates.name: PPLRPPL
splitTemplates.description: Classic 6-day Push/Pull/Legs rotation with one rest day. Each movement pattern is trained twice weekly.

splitTemplates.name: 5-Day Bro Split
splitTemplates.description: Classic 5-day body-part split with two rest days. High session volume, lower weekly frequency.
